mentions.note: Logistics REIT pivoting to data center power play. 5.6GW energized, 1.3GW solar (only 8% of roofs deployed). Core logistics sold out on large-format; $750M mark-to-market upside on lease renewals. E-commerce tailwind (3x warehouse intensity). Stock up 30% past 12 months but yields 3%; CEO frames data centers as largest value creation opportunity. Long-term structural growth.
